description_long: This sculpture consists of a realistic bust of a man, rendered in dark gray stone or metal, mounted atop a rectangular stone pedestal. The bust features detailed facial features, short hair, and a solemn expression, suggesting a commemorative or memorial purpose. The pedestal is made of light gray stone and bears an inscription on the front reading 'WOLFGANG LANGHOFF 1901 1966.' The back of the pedestal has a small plaque, likely providing additional information about the subject or artist. The overall form is solid and monolithic, with clean, straight lines on the pedestal contrasting with the textured, lifelike surface of the bust. The sculpture is designed to be viewed from all sides, with the front view highlighting the inscription and the face of the bust.
description: A commemorative bust of a man, Wolfgang Langhoff, mounted on a rectangular stone pedestal with an inscribed front and a small plaque on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed bust and the inscribed pedestal with the name 'WOLFGANG LANGHOFF 1901 1966.'
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the profile of the bust and the plain side of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the head and a small plaque on the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the profile of the bust and the unadorned side of the pedestal.
attribute_location_context: No specific environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
